title: Stakar Ogord
content:
{{Character |image = Stakar Ogord.jpg |real name = Stakar Ogord{{Ref|GotGV2}} |citizenship = [[Arcturus|Arcturan]] |gender = Male |title = Captain |affiliation = {{Affiliation|RVG}}
*{{Affiliation|SRC}}
*{{Affiliation|SOT}}
*{{Affiliation|URVG}} |movie = ''[[Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 2]]''
''[[Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 3]]'' |tv movie = ''[[The Guardians of the Galaxy Holiday Special]]'' (mentioned) |actor = [[Sylvester Stallone]] |status = Alive}} {{Quote|You may dress like us, but you'll never hear the horns of freedom when you die, Yondu, and the [[Stakar Ravager Clan|colors of Ogord]] will never flash over your grave.|Stakar Ogord to [[Yondu Udonta]]|Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 2}} '''Stakar Ogord''' is a [[Ravagers|Ravager]] pirate captain and the founder of the [[Stakar Ravager Clan]]. Ogord saved [[Yondu Udonta]] from a life of slavery and welcomed him to the Ravagers, but he was later forced to exile Udonta for engaging in child trafficking, which violated the Ravager code. In [[2014]], upon learning that Udonta had sacrificed his life to save [[Peter Quill]] from [[Ego]], Ogord honored his former friend with a Ravager funeral. He then reunited with his former Ravager teammates, who each led their own clans, to partner together. By [[2026]], Ogord and a few other Ravager clans formed the [[United Ravagers]] and assisted the [[Guardians of the Galaxy]] in breaking into the [[Orgoscope]]. ==Biography== {{MD|Stakar Ogord (Earth-199999)}} ===Ravager Captain=== ====Marrying Aleta==== {{Quote|I said '[[Aleta Ogord|Aleta]], I love you, girl... but you're losing your mind!'.|Stakar Ogord to [[Stakar Ravager Clan|his Ravagers]]|Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 2}} As a young [[Ravagers|Ravager]], Ogord met a fellow Ravager, [[Aleta Ogord|Aleta]], and spent many years traveling with her. While Ogord was quite fond and in love with Aleta, he usually regarded her as dangerous because of her crazy personality, and had hard times trusting her. Nevertheless, the two end up marrying each other, and become captains of their respective Ravager clans.{{Ref|GotGV2}} ====Meeting Yondu Udonta==== {{Quote|I was a [[Kree]] battle slave for twenty years until Stakar freed me. He offered me a place with the [[Ravagers]], said all I needed to do was to adhere to the code.|[[Yondu Udonta]]|Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 2}} Many years before, Ogord rescued [[Yondu Udonta]] from life as a battle slave for the [[Kree Empire]] and inducted him into the [[Ravagers]]. However, he later discovered that Udonta had accepted a contract from [[Ego]] to deliver several of the [[Celestials|Celestial's]] own children to him, breaking the Ravager's code, which prohibited them from engaging in child trafficking. While reluctant to do so, Ogord was forced to exile Udonta from the Ravagers because of his actions.{{Ref|GotGV2}} ====Awkward Reunion==== [[File:Stakar Ogord 1.png|{{AltFloat}}|Ogord with his [[Ravagers]] [[Stakar Ravager Clan|clan]] at the [[Iron Lotus]]]] {{Quote|If you think I take pleasure in exiling you, you're wrong. You broke all our hearts.|Stakar Ogord to [[Yondu Udonta]]|Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 2}} Later, Ogord, along with his [[Stakar Ravager Clan|clan]] of [[Ravagers]] went to the [[Iron Lotus]] to relax when he was approached by [[Yondu Udonta]]. Having exiled Udonta, Ogord refused to greet him and left the Iron Lotus, informing its madam that by servicing Udonta's exiled clan she had lost all the other Ravager clans as customers. [[File:Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 2 203.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Ogord furiously argues with [[Yondu Udonta]]]] Angered at Ogord's dismissal, Udonta confronted Ogord to tell him what he had to say, leading the two to get into an argument. Ogord angrily refused to listen to Yondu, stating that he had been dealing in children and that had broke the Ravager code and knowing fully well that Yondu deep down did not know but didn't care as he got rich. Ogord furiously refused to acknowledge Udonta and his clan as part of the Ravagers, stating that they would never show up on his grave. He bitterly expressed how it broke his heart at having to exile him but it was necessary before leaving.{{Ref|GotGV2}} ====Yondu Udonta's Funeral==== [[File:Martinex Stakar.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Ogord pays his respects to [[Yondu Udonta]]]] {{Quote|You know, it's a shame that it took the tragedy of losing [[Yondu Udonta|Yondu]] to bring us all together again. But I think he would be proud knowing that we're back as a team.|Stakar to his [[Stakar Ogord's Team|team]]|Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 2}} After [[Rocket]] contacted the [[Ravagers]] to tell them of [[Yondu Udonta]]'s role in the [[Battle on Ego's Planet]] and also his subsequent sacrifice to save [[Peter Quill]]'s life, Ogord, moved by his friend's heroic participation, was finally able to forgive Yondu. He and the other Ravager captains arrived during the funeral, where their ships saluted the dead Ravager in traditional fashion, signaling their re-acceptance of him as one of them. [[File:Guardians 3000.png|{{AltFloat}}|Ogord reunites with his [[Stakar Ogord's Team|team]]]] Afterwards, he reunited the [[Stakar Ogord's Team|team]] and decided to go on adventures together and steal stuff. With Ogord being joined by his wife [[Aleta Ogord]] and [[Martinex]], they also recruited [[Charlie-27]], [[Krugarr]] and [[Mainframe]] who all expressed their excitement at being back together. Ogord then happily suggested they resume their former thieving activities.{{Ref|GotGV2}} ===United Ravagers=== At some point after the reunification of Ogord's old Ravager team, several Ravager clans, including Ogord's clan, grouped together to form the United Ravagers and acted collectively as a much larger team, where they will conduct thieving activities and heists together. After the [[Battle of Earth]], Ogord and his crew welcomed a time-displaced [[Gamora/Cosmic Time Heist|Gamora]] who came from an alternate timeline into their ranks.{{Ref|GotGV3}} ====Helping the Guardians==== [[File:Stakar in a spacesuit.png|{{AltFloat}}|Ogord floating outside of the ''[[Bowie]]'']] {{Quote|Once in, [[Gamora/Cosmic Time Heist|Gamora]] is gonna lead you to the records, where maybe you can find the passkey to override the kill switch and help you save the [[Rocket|hedgehog]]. But if you get into trouble, [[United Ravagers|we]] will not be able to bail you out.|Stakar Ogord to the [[Guardians of the Galaxy]]|Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 3}} The United Ravagers were contacted by [[Nebula]], through [[Gamora/Cosmic Time Heist|Gamora]], to help the [[Guardians of the Galaxy]] [[Infiltration into the Orgoscope|infiltrate]] into the [[Orgoscope]]. They hijacked and boarded the Guardians' [[Bowie|ship]], after it had penetrated through the Orgoscope's security shields. [[File:Stakar Ogord Vol 3.png|{{AltFloat}}|Ogord explains the plan to the [[Guardians of the Galaxy|Guardians]]]] Once it was cleared up they were the ones that called Gamora, the Ravagers stood down, and Ogord entered the ship. The Guardians were supplied [[OrgoCorp]] uniforms, which [[Drax the Destroyer]] complained about the color not matching his eyes, but Ogord had no patience for it and yelled at Drax to put it on. Ogord explained the plan to them to steal the passkey to save [[Rocket]]. Ogord told the Guardians that Gamora would be joining them to get inside, but warned them that once inside, the Ravagers would not be able to help them, so they were on their own to escape.{{Ref|GotGV3}} ====Reuniting with Gamora==== [[File:Stakar and Gamora.png|{{AltFloat}}|Ogord embraces [[Gamora/Cosmic Time Heist|Gamora]] upon her return]] {{Quote|Welcome home.|Stakar Ogord to [[Gamora/Cosmic Time Heist|Gamora]]|Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 3}} After [[Gamora/Cosmic Time Heist|Gamora]]'s adventure with the [[Guardians of the Galaxy]], she was picked up from [[Knowhere]] and rejoined the [[United Ravagers]]. Ogord was very happy to see her return, and embraced her in joy while other members of the Ravagers also celebrated happily.{{Ref|GotGV3}} ==Abilities== {{Quote|What say we steal some shit?|Stakar Ogord|Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 2}} *'''Master Thief''': Ogord is one of the most legendary [[Ravagers]] and is the captain of a [[Stakar Ogord's Team|Clan]]. *'''Master Tactician''': As the captain of his own Ravager [[Stakar Ogord's Team|faction]], Ogord commanded dozens of [[Ravagers]], causing many to consider him the most legendary [[Ravagers|Ravager]] ever. ==Equipment== *'''Stakar Ogord's Suit''': Ogord wore a suit that has "fins" attached to the shoulder position, which oddly resembles that of a hawk. This suit also includes a helmet which allows Ogord to survive in space and can emit strong light. ==Vehicles== *'''[[Stakar Ogord's Warship]]''': Ogord's clan lived on his warship where they participated in [[Yondu Udonta]]'s funeral. ==Facilities== *'''[[Iron Lotus]]''': Ogord and his [[Stakar Ravager Clan|fellow ravagers]] were patrons of the [[Contraxia|Contraxian]] establishment. [[Yondu Udonta]] tried to talk with them there but given Udonta's status as an exile Ogord and his crew stormed off. ==Relationships== ===Family=== *[[Aleta Ogord]] - Wife and Former Teammate ===Allies=== *[[Ravagers]] **[[Stakar Ravager Clan]] - Subordinates **[[Stakar Ogord's Team]] - Former Teammates ***[[Charlie-27]] - Friend **[[Yondu Ravager Clan]] ***[[Yondu Udonta]] † - Former Protegé and Former Teammate **[[United Ravagers]] - Teammates and Friends ***[[Martinex]] - First Officer ***[[Krugarr]] ***[[Mainframe]] ***[[Gamora/Cosmic Time Heist|Gamora]] ***[[Beardy Ravager]] ***[[Fitz-Gibbonok]] † ***[[Molly]] *[[Blurp]] *[[Guardians of the Galaxy]] **[[Star-Lord|Peter Quill/Star-Lord]] **[[Rocket]] **[[Groot]] **[[Drax the Destroyer]] **[[Mantis]] **[[Nebula]] ==Trivia== *In [[w:c:marvel:Earth-691|an alternate 30th Century]], Stakar Ogord is the biological son of [[w:c:marvel:Quasar|Quasar]] and [[Ayesha|Kismet]], but was kidnapped and raised by the [[Arcturans]]. After he and his adopted sister and wife [[Aleta Ogord|Aleta]] had been merged by the power of the [[w:c:marvel:Hawk God|Hawk God]], they became the superpowered hero '''Starhawk''', and eventually they joined the [[Stakar Ogord's Team|Guardians of the Galaxy]]. *The fins on Stakar's shoulders are a reference to his comic book costume. ==Behind the Scenes== *Stakar Ogord first appeared in the Behind-the-Scenes feature for ''[[Guardians of the Galaxy (film)|Guardians of the Galaxy]]'', as a background character within the mock-up video game that serves as introduction to the different chapters of the feature. ==References== {{Gallery|Stakar Ogord/Gallery}} {{Reflist}} ==External Links== *{{Marvel}} *{{WP|Starhawk (comics)|Stakar Ogord}} [[es:Stakar Ogord]] [[fr:Stakar Ogord]] [[ru:Стакар Огорд]] [[Category:Characters]] [[Category:Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 2 Characters]] [[Category:Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 3 Characters]] [[Category:Unknown Race]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Gray Hair]] [[Category:Brown Eyes]] [[Category:Criminals]] [[Category:Mercenaries]] [[Category:Ravagers Captains]] [[Category:Stakar Ogord's Team Members]] [[Category:United Ravagers Members]]
